package.name: multibot_perception
package.description: AIR26 workshop 03 — Tier-1 marker localization. aruco_pose_detector estimates each visible marker's 3D pose (solvePnP, known intrinsics + size) and publishes it + TF. relative_localizer turns marker ids (= name+pose of an entity) into named peer poses and a world-anchor correction, so each unit knows where its peers and the world are.
